title: Replace second gallery image with campus corridor photo

requirements.summary: Replace the second image slot in the 'Our Campus' gallery section with the new campus corridor photo asset
acceptanceCriteria: The second image card in the 'Our Campus' gallery section displays the school corridor photo (campus-corridor.dim_800x600.jpg).
The image uses object-fit: cover and fills the card at the same dimensions as other gallery images.
No broken image placeholders are visible in the gallery section.
All other gallery slots (first image and placeholder cards) remain unchanged.

file_operations.description: Replace the second img element in the 'Our Campus' gallery section (at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/div[1]/section[3]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/img[1]) with a new img element sourcing the generated asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/campus-corridor.dim_800x600.jpg. Ensure the img element uses object-fit: cover via className or inline style to match the existing gallery card styling. Verify that the image path uses /assets/generated/campus-corridor.dim_800x600.jpg (root-relative public asset path) and that the second gallery card maintains consistent dimensions with the first and third gallery items.
